content.text:
{The truth will set you free.}{John 8:32}
 {Data is the new oil of the digital economy.}{— Clive Humby}
Linear algebra is the foundation of modern data science.

content.title: PCA
content.content:
**Principal Component Analysis** finds orthogonal 
directions of maximum variance in data.

Given centered data matrix $X$ (rows = observations, columns = features):

1. Compute covariance matrix $C = \frac{1}{n-1}X\transpose X$

2. Find eigenvalues and eigenvectors of $C$

3. Principal components are eigenvectors ordered by eigenvalue

content.text:
Spectral clustering uses eigenvectors of similarity matrices to 
partition data.
